extraction.one_line_summary: ARU Fabio attacked in massive gear 1.5 miles from finish on Planche des Belles Filles, soloed to 16-second stage win while FROOME took yellow.
tactical_patterns: Team Sky controlled entire climb with six riders but Froome couldn't follow Aru's oversized gear attack, questioning stage race sharpness.
Yates Simon attacked aggressively showing climbing form superior to other white jersey contenders, gap only 24 seconds not usual hours.
Martin Dan overtook Port Richie in final kilometer suggesting BMC leader already cracking on short steep finishes under 6km.

rider_signals.ARU Fabio: positive: attacked in oversized gear then recovered cadence to finish, form building with two wins in two weeks entering Tour
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: neutral: controlled race into yellow but couldn't respond to Aru's acceleration, less emphatic than expected for peak form
rider_signals.PORT Richie: negative: locked up when Martin attacked late, already conceding time bonuses to Froome on short 5.9km climb
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: looked strongest of white jersey contenders attacking late, targets jersey not just top-10
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: neutral: lost time as expected on steep short climb, needs longer ascents to compete
